string FormAbility_desc 0x04000005
string FormAbility_label 0x04000006
string app_name 0x04000000
string module_desc 0x04000007
string widget_desc 0x04000008
string widget_label 0x04000009
color start_window_background 0x0400000a
media background 0x04000003
media foreground 0x04000002
media layered_image 0x04000001
media startIcon 0x0400000c
profile form_config 0x04000004
profile main_pages 0x0400000b
